purpose: Normative vocabulary ownership for Contractify ADR overlap review. This is ownership metadata, not an ignore list.

runtime authority.notes: ADR-0001 defines runtime authority; other anchors may reference it only as a dependency or applied constraint.

session surface.notes: ADR-0002 defines backend session-surface quarantine and labeling; ADR-0001 may mention session surfaces only as higher-order authority context.

backend session surface.notes: Canonical synonym of the session-surface bucket for governance review.

canonical scene identity surface.notes: ADR-0003 defines scene-identity ownership and continuity; downstream GoC docs consume it.
